Sector 49, a locality in Noida, is experiencing growth and development in the recent years. As a result, real estate market is growing rapidly.This locality is also popularly known as Hindon Vihar, Baraula. It is well-connected to the neighbouring localities by wide roads. The inhabitants of the locality have easy access to public facilities such as schools, colleges, hospitals, recreational areas and parks. Sector 49 real estate enjoys a steady demand for residential properties due to the availability of quality housing units. The developers in the area are adapting at a quick pace to invest the best of their expertise for constructing commercial and residential buildings with excellent infrastructure, amenities and facilities. Primary builders in Sector 49 like Adarsh Group and USK Developers are enhancing the developmental activities in the area further.Reasons to invest in Sector 49:Situated at a walking distance from Noida City Center Metro Station, Sector 49 is now a prominent destination which is attracting investors. With its strategic location and easy accessibility to DND Flyway, Sector 18 Metro Station, Greater Noida Expressway and Ghaziabad along with the proximity to major transportation links, the area has become one of the prime locations of Noida. Facilities such as street lights and the availability of water, the management of sewage and wastes make the region an ideal location for real estate investors, property builders and home-buyers. Further with continuous major developments such as widening and elevation of roads, flyovers, underpasses, bridges, roundabouts on expressways, some of which are already under construction makes Sector 49 unquestionably a potential investment proposition.

When coming from the Delhi Side, one need to reach Pari Chowk, take right turn on Surajpur Kasna Road and take the left turn on Kasna Gol chakkar, after driving few meters on this road take another left turn and now you reached to this property just opposite to the Jaypee Green Golf Course.Emergence of Greater Noida as a commercial hub and have the benefits of excellent connectivity to different parts of Delhi NCR, it has got very super infrastructure like Noida - Greater Noida expressway (offers seamless connectivity between Delhi Noida & Greater Noida), Yamuna Expressway (Noida and Greater Noida to the rest of UP), FNG Expressway (this nearing completion project will connect Noida with every corner of Delhi NCR) and Upcoming Metro Station (This metro corridor will give convenient and fast connectivity from every part of Delhi, Gurgaon, Ghaziabad and Faridabad). Now Greater Noida has experienced a boom in the residential property market and has appeared as one of NCR‚ s best residential micro markets, offering excellent returns for investors. It is estimated that the number of working professionals in this region will raise manifolds in the next few years or so, which will increase residential property demand as a result.

When coming from the Delhi Side, one need to reach Pari Chowk, take right turn on Surajpur Kasna Road and take the left turn on Kasna Gol chakkar, after driving few meters on this road take another left turn and now you reached to this property just opposite to the Jaypee Green Golf Course.Emergence of Greater Noida as a commercial hub and have the benefits of excellent connectivity to different parts of Delhi NCR, it has got very super infrastructure like Noida - Greater Noida expressway (offers seamless connectivity between Delhi Noida & Greater Noida), Yamuna Expressway (Noida and Greater Noida to the rest of UP), FNG Expressway (this nearing completion project will connect Noida with every corner of Delhi NCR) and Upcoming Metro Station (This metro corridor will give convenient and fast connectivity from every part of Delhi, Gurgaon, Ghaziabad and Faridabad). Now Greater Noida has experienced a boom in the residential property market and has appeared as one of NCR‚ s best residential micro markets, offering excellent returns for investors. It is estimated that the number of working professionals in this region will raise manifolds in the next few years or so, which will increase residential property demand as a result.

Locality Guide
for Sector 47, Noida
Share
Sector 47, a locality in Noida, is continuously developing to become an attractive destination for the real estate developers and home-buyers.In terms of Sector 47 real estate, good connectivity in terms of transportation facilities and wide roads are the major factors that make the area worth investing for both the developers and the buyers of residential buildings. The presence of reputed schools, colleges, banks, hospitals and commercial spaces are aiding in the gradual development of the region. Developers and builders are therefore rapidly building up high-rise and luxurious buildings to attract more property buyers in the hope of making profit. The buyers are therefore grabbing the opportunity to purchase flats in this developing area which often comes up with lucrative perks.Leading developers and builders in Sector 47 like Navin Ahuja and Magicvilla are leaving no stone unturned to make use of the available space for building and designing independent houses in Sector 47 and corporate offices in and around. Reasons to invest in Sector 47:Sector 47 has well maintained parks, roads and security arrangements. It boasts of some of the most well maintained and wide roads in Noida. The supply of water to the area is relatively much better as compared to some of the other sectors in Noida. Also, the natural underground water is available to the residents. However, the biggest issue which is faced by the residents of the area is the lack of any commercial space in the sector. Absence of a proper market forces the residents to travel all the way to Sector 41 or Sector 50 markets for all their requirements. Overall, Sector 47 is attracting both the developers and the property-buyers.

Locality Guide
for Sector 133, Noida
Share
Sector 133, Noida is one of the well-known localities of Noida. The area enjoys the advantages of a prominent location without missing out on the charms of lush greenery of nature. Tranquil environment in the close vicinity of nature makes this location one of the most sought after ones. The Jaypee 18-hole Signature Golf Course is nearby giving residents the opportunity to refresh and rejuvenate themselves. Designed by Graham Cooke & Associates on approx. 44.53 Hectare (ha) of lush land, the Golf Course is made complete by beautiful landscaped greens and numerous lakes and water bodies giving you a serene and refreshing view from your home as well as ensuring that you live a life beyond the usual. The area lies in the close vicinity of Noida-Greater Noida Expressway thereby providing it with better connectivity avenues. The location enjoys good connectivity through rail and roads that add value to the location. Various modes of local transportation aided by buses, autos and taxis are available for the inhabitants that help them in a hassle-free commuting experience. Tugalakabad Railway Station is the nearby railway station to this locality; however Nizamuddin Railway Station is the major junction that lies at a short distance from this area. Being a prominent location, Sector 133, Noida enjoys various benefits that attract home seekers to this place. Presence of various world class schools, colleges, hospitals markets make the area score higher on the parameters of a decent life style.

Locality Guide
for Sector 135, Noida
Share
Locality Overview Video
Sector 135 is a fast-developing locality located in the Noida Expressway region of Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India. It is situated along the Noida-Greater Noida Expressway, which is a major thoroughfare connecting Noida with Greater Noida. Sector 135 is well-connected to other parts of Noida and Delhi through various modes of transportation, including buses, taxis, and metro. Nearest metro station to Sector 135 NoidaThe nearest metro station is the Botanical Garden metro station, which is part of the Delhi Metro's Blue Line. The area is undergoing rapid development with the construction of several residential and commercial projects. Many leading developers are investing in this area, and several housing projects are being developed to cater to the growing demand for affordable housing. Sector 135 also has several educational institutions in the vicinity, including the Shiv Nadar School, the Genesis Global School, and the Amity University. The area also has a few shopping and entertainment options, including the DLF Mall of India, which is located nearby. Overall, Sector 135 is a developing locality in Noida, offering a convenient and affordable lifestyle to its residents. The area is also a good investment option for those looking to invest in real estate in Noida. Sector 168, Sector 142, Wazidpur, Sector 130, Sector 167 are the nearby localities to Sector 135.

A perfectly planned hub, Sector 12 in one of the happening cities of Noida. Noida City Center Metro and Golf Course Metro connects this locale to other nearby places. National Highway 8 is a major roadway linking this area to the nearby localities. The Safdarjung Airport is the nearest runway from here that connects Sector 12 to other major national and international cities. A number of educational institutes are located at a close proximity which includes Manav Rachna International School, Nilgiri Hills Public School, Ramagya School, etc. Presence of excellent connectivity, ample recreational scope and affordable housing opportunities has rightly established Sector 12, Noida as a Real Estate favorite.

Sector 50 in Noida is a highly sought-after locality known for its modern infrastructure and well-planned layout. The area boasts spacious green parks, wide roads, and top-notch amenities such as schools, hospitals, and shopping centres. Its strategic location provides easy access to major roads and Delhi-NCR, making commuting convenient. The neighbourhood is clean, safe, and vibrant, with a good mix of residential and Commercial spaces. Overall, it's an excellent place for families and professionals alike.

Locality Guide
for Sector 47, Noida
Share
Sector 47, a locality in Noida, is continuously developing to become an attractive destination for the real estate developers and home-buyers.In terms of Sector 47 real estate, good connectivity in terms of transportation facilities and wide roads are the major factors that make the area worth investing for both the developers and the buyers of residential buildings. The presence of reputed schools, colleges, banks, hospitals and commercial spaces are aiding in the gradual development of the region. Developers and builders are therefore rapidly building up high-rise and luxurious buildings to attract more property buyers in the hope of making profit. The buyers are therefore grabbing the opportunity to purchase flats in this developing area which often comes up with lucrative perks.Leading developers and builders in Sector 47 like Navin Ahuja and Magicvilla are leaving no stone unturned to make use of the available space for building and designing independent houses in Sector 47 and corporate offices in and around. Reasons to invest in Sector 47:Sector 47 has well maintained parks, roads and security arrangements. It boasts of some of the most well maintained and wide roads in Noida. The supply of water to the area is relatively much better as compared to some of the other sectors in Noida. Also, the natural underground water is available to the residents. However, the biggest issue which is faced by the residents of the area is the lack of any commercial space in the sector. Absence of a proper market forces the residents to travel all the way to Sector 41 or Sector 50 markets for all their requirements. Overall, Sector 47 is attracting both the developers and the property-buyers.

Locality Guide
for Sector 16, Noida
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
9 More
Sector 16, known to be an extremely peaceful locality, is well connected via rails and roads to the other adjoining parts of the city. Linked to Noida, Greater Noida and Ghaziabad, it is located in the Gautam Budh Nagar district of Uttar Pradesh. It conceptualizes the requirements of a rapidly developing area and has emerged as a modern, integrated and well planned industrial locale that is well connected to Delhi through national highways, ultra modern flyovers and a strong network of roads. Being a highly integrated township, it offers facilities for all activities ranging from Industrial to Commercial and Residential. The area has its own geographical advantage as it is bordered by Noida on one side and Greater Noida on the other. With direct connectivity to the NH 24 (Delhi- Lucknow Highway), the region easily gets linked to Lucknow through the cities of Ghaziabad, Hapur, Moradabad, Bareilly, Shahjahanpur and Sitapur. To enhance the connectivity of the region, the Noida Authority is speeding-up the work on Faridadbad-Noida-Ghaziabad Expressway (FNG). Moreover, the connectivity of this area has received another boost with the extension of the existing City Centre Metro line to the Noida Extension. The locality witnessed huge growth on account of systematic infrastructure developments along with planning for creation of a lot of residential and commercial spaces in the region. The place houses various schools, banks, hospitals and ATMs, which makes your life much more convenient as compared to other areas.

Locality Guide
for Sector 16, Noida
Share
Locality Overview Video
+
9 More
Sector 16, known to be an extremely peaceful locality, is well connected via rails and roads to the other adjoining parts of the city. Linked to Noida, Greater Noida and Ghaziabad, it is located in the Gautam Budh Nagar district of Uttar Pradesh. It conceptualizes the requirements of a rapidly developing area and has emerged as a modern, integrated and well planned industrial locale that is well connected to Delhi through national highways, ultra modern flyovers and a strong network of roads. Being a highly integrated township, it offers facilities for all activities ranging from Industrial to Commercial and Residential. The area has its own geographical advantage as it is bordered by Noida on one side and Greater Noida on the other. With direct connectivity to the NH 24 (Delhi- Lucknow Highway), the region easily gets linked to Lucknow through the cities of Ghaziabad, Hapur, Moradabad, Bareilly, Shahjahanpur and Sitapur. To enhance the connectivity of the region, the Noida Authority is speeding-up the work on Faridadbad-Noida-Ghaziabad Expressway (FNG). Moreover, the connectivity of this area has received another boost with the extension of the existing City Centre Metro line to the Noida Extension. The locality witnessed huge growth on account of systematic infrastructure developments along with planning for creation of a lot of residential and commercial spaces in the region. The place houses various schools, banks, hospitals and ATMs, which makes your life much more convenient as compared to other areas.

Tenant | 2 years ago
2
The connectivity is ok ok, mostly u won't find any public transport.....but there are no good hospitals nearby, only hospital for very basic medical conditions are available. Being a doctor myself, I do not see any Advanced Medical centre nearby.Mostly it's safe till 9 pm, not beyond because of the adjacent Aghapur area which has no boundaries or gates. Neighborhood is ok......comprising mostly of elderly population. In all houses basically, there will be old couple living, who like a silent, peaceful environment. There is no nightlife in Sector 41 or nearby areas. It's not a very upcoming area in terms of investment or living. Basically if u hv crossed ur 50s, it can be a good abode for u

Proximity to Noida City Centre Metro Station enhances connectivity to Delhi and other parts of Noida, making daily commuting convenient for residents.read more

A perfectly planned hub, Sector 12 in one of the happening cities of Noida. Noida City Center Metro and Golf Course Metro connects this locale to other nearby places. National Highway 8 is a major roadway linking this area to the nearby localities. The Safdarjung Airport is the nearest runway from here that connects Sector 12 to other major national and international cities. The neighboring areas near to this location include Sector 20, 16, 17 and Jal Vayu Vihar. A number of educational institutes are located at a close proximity which includes Manav Rachna International School, Nilgiri Hills Public School, Ramagya School, etc. Presence of excellent connectivity, ample recreational scope and affordable housing opportunities has rightly established Sector 12, Noida as a Real Estate favorite.

A perfectly planned hub, Sector 36 in one of the happening cities of Noida. Noida City Center Metro and Golf Course Metro connects this locale to other nearby places. National Highway 8 is a major roadway linking this area to the nearby localities. The Safdarjung Airport is the nearest runway from here that connects Sector 36 to other major national and international cities. The neighboring areas near to this location include Sector 31, 28, 29 and Jal Vayu Vihar. A number of educational institutes are located at a close proximity which includes Manav Rachna International School, Nilgiri Hills Public School, Ramagya School, etc. Presence of excellent connectivity, ample recreational scope and affordable housing opportunities has rightly established Sector 36, Noida as a Real Estate favorite.

Sector 22 in Noida, is receiving a healthy demand for residential properties due to the availability of quality housing in all-budget categories. Flourishing as a real estate market in the hands of skilled developers and builders with their luxurious and affordable projects, Sector 22 has become an ideal destination for home-buyers. Good connectivity of the region with other parts of the suburb and also with the other cities via metro, trains and flights are attracting more buyers in Sector 22 real estate. The nearest airport to the area makes a provision of connecting the place to other cities, states and even countries. As a result, the developers are coming up with more residential and commercial projects to meet the increased demand of housing units. In the recent times, the region has witnessed immense progress in terms of infrastructural development such as coming up of many schools and colleges, hospitals and even recreational parks which are the major factors of growth of any area. Leading builders in Sector 22 include ATS group and GAURSONS group which assures on one hand easy availability of residential flats and on the other hand, a huge commercial development of the area.Reasons to invest in Sector 22:The price trends in Sector 22 indicate that there is an availability of all-budget housing units which will draw more investors to buy properties. Factors such as proximity to major transportation facilities such as metro station, railway station and an international airport help to connect the region not only to other internal parts of the district or the city but also to connect with the other parts of the world. These are the eminent factors that are attracting both the developers and the property-buyers to make investments in the area.

The house on Sector 19 is situated just where DND ends in Noida; if coming from Delhi, turn left. Despite being in the centre of the city, Sector 19 is quiet. It is also adjacent to the metro, the GIP, SUB, and Center Stage malls, as well as bus stations for Delhi and Noida Sector.

Locality Guide
for Sector 19, Noida

Locality Overview Video

4 More
A perfectly planned hub, Sector 19 in one of the happening cities of Noida. Noida City Center Metro and Golf Course Metro connects this locale to other nearby places. National Highway 8 is a major roadway linking this area to the nearby localities. The Safdarjung Airport is the nearest runway from here that connects Sector 19 to other major national and international cities. The neighboring areas near to this location include Sector 20, 16, 17 and Jal Vayu Vihar. A number of educational institutes are located at a close proximity which includes Manav Rachna International School, Nilgiri Hills Public School, Ramagya School, etc. Presence of excellent connectivity, ample recreational scope and affordable housing opportunities has rightly established Sector 19, Noida as a Real Estate favorite.

A perfectly planned hub, Sector 12 in one of the happening cities of Noida. Noida City Center Metro and Golf Course Metro connects this locale to other nearby places. National Highway 8 is a major roadway linking this area to the nearby localities. The Safdarjung Airport is the nearest runway from here that connects Sector 12 to other major national and international cities. The neighboring areas near to this location include Sector 20, 16, 17 and Jal Vayu Vihar. A number of educational institutes are located at a close proximity which includes Manav Rachna International School, Nilgiri Hills Public School, Ramagya School, etc. Presence of excellent connectivity, ample recreational scope and affordable housing opportunities has rightly established Sector 12, Noida as a Real Estate favorite.

The connectivity is ok ok, mostly u won't find any public transport.....but there are no good hospitals nearby, only hospital for very basic medical conditions are available. Being a doctor myself, I do not see any Advanced Medical centre nearby.Mostly it's safe till 9 pm, not beyond because of the adjacent Aghapur area which has no boundaries or gates. Neighborhood is ok......comprising mostly of elderly population. In all houses basically, there will be old couple living, who like a silent, peaceful environment. There is no nightlife in Sector 41 or nearby areas. It's not a very upcoming area in terms of investment or living. Basically if u hv crossed ur 50s, it can be a good abode for u

Proximity to Noida City Centre Metro Station enhances connectivity to Delhi and other parts of Noida, making daily commuting convenient for residents.read more

Locality Guide
for Sector 133, Noida
Share
Sector 133, Noida is one of the well-known localities of Noida. The area enjoys the advantages of a prominent location without missing out on the charms of lush greenery of nature. Tranquil environment in the close vicinity of nature makes this location one of the most sought after ones. The Jaypee 18-hole Signature Golf Course is nearby giving residents the opportunity to refresh and rejuvenate themselves. Designed by Graham Cooke & Associates on approx. 44.53 Hectare (ha) of lush land, the Golf Course is made complete by beautiful landscaped greens and numerous lakes and water bodies giving you a serene and refreshing view from your home as well as ensuring that you live a life beyond the usual. The area lies in the close vicinity of Noida-Greater Noida Expressway thereby providing it with better connectivity avenues. The location enjoys good connectivity through rail and roads that add value to the location. Various modes of local transportation aided by buses, autos and taxis are available for the inhabitants that help them in a hassle-free commuting experience. Tugalakabad Railway Station is the nearby railway station to this locality; however Nizamuddin Railway Station is the major junction that lies at a short distance from this area. Being a prominent location, Sector 133, Noida enjoys various benefits that attract home seekers to this place. Presence of various world class schools, colleges, hospitals markets make the area score higher on the parameters of a decent life style.

About Jaypee Kensington Park Plot Phase 2
Jaypee Kensington Park Plot Phase 2 is a residential plot by Jaypee Greens. This plot is available for sale in Sector 133, Noida. This project offers plots in various sizes. The minimum plot size is 1000.0 sq.ft. and the maximum size is 2300.0 sq.ft.. This project was launched on December 2012. The address of Jaypee Kensington Park Plot Phase 2 is Sector 133.
Jaypee Kensington Park Plot Phase 2 ensures a coveted lifestyle and offers a convenient living. It offers facilities such as Gymnasium, Power Backup. For families with kids, there is Children's Play Area, nearby apart from Swimming Pool, Recreation Facilities. Sports enthusiasts can also make the most of Cycling & Jogging Track. Residents can also enjoy ATM, Library, Restaurants/ Cafeterias, Conference Room, provisions in the project. The property is equipped with Fire Sprinklers. There is 24x7 Security. Other provisions include access to Banquet Hall, Landscaping & Tree Planting, Solid Waste Management And Disposal, Water Storage, Maintenance Staff.
Bank loan is approved from major banks such as HDFC, Punjab National Bank .
Jaypee Greens is a reputed developer firm established in 2000. The firm has since then developed 85 and focuses on customer-centricity. Check out Jaypee Kensington Park Plot Phase 2 brochure for more details.
Sector 133 is well-connected to other parts of city by road, which passes through the heart of this suburb. Prominent shopping malls, movie theatres, school, and hospitals are present in proximity of this residential project.
